message:
fix: Disable AVX-512 completely in libdeflate to fix CI build

The previous flag -DLIBDEFLATE_ASSEMBLER_DOES_NOT_SUPPORT_AVX512VNNI only
disabled AVX-512 VNNI, but libdeflate was still trying to compile base
AVX-512 code with intrinsics like _mm512_loadu_si512 which requires evex512.

Use -DLIBDEFLATE_DISABLE_AVX512=1 to completely disable all AVX-512 code
paths at compile time. libdeflate will fall back to AVX2/SSE which still
provides excellent performance (and GitHub CI runners don't have AVX-512).
